refund.missing_tid: Cannot process refund: transaction ID is missing.

cbt_reconciliation.not_retryable: This CBT refund item is not retryable.

cbt_cvs.not_cvs: This order is not a CBT convenience store payment.
cbt_cvs.not_test_mode: Deposit notification simulation is available only for test-mode CBT convenience store orders.
cbt_cvs.not_waiting_deposit: This CBT convenience store order is not waiting for deposit.
cbt_cvs.not_expirable: Only overdue CBT convenience store orders waiting for deposit can be marked as expired.
cbt_cvs.simulate_failed: CBT convenience store deposit notification simulation failed.
cbt_cvs.simulate_success: CBT convenience store deposit notification simulation completed.
cbt_cvs.expire_success: The CBT convenience store order was marked as deposit expired.
cbt_cvs.recheck_success: CBT convenience store local status was rechecked.

settings_validation.test_japan_sign_key_required: The test Japan CBT hash key is required to use Japan payment (CBT).
settings_validation.live_japan_mid_required: The live Japan MID is required to use Japan payment (CBT) in live mode.
settings_validation.live_japan_sign_key_required: The live Japan CBT hash key is required to use Japan payment (CBT) in live mode.
settings_validation.japan_merchant_name_required: Merchant name for the live Japan payment window is required.
settings_validation.japan_merchant_name_kana_required: Merchant name Kana for the live Japan payment window is required.
settings_validation.japan_merchant_name_alphabet_required: Alphabet merchant name for the live Japan payment window is required.
settings_validation.japan_merchant_name_short_required: Short merchant name for the live Japan payment window is required.
settings_validation.japan_contact_name_required: Contact name for the live Japan payment window is required.
settings_validation.japan_contact_email_required: Contact email for the live Japan payment window is required.
settings_validation.japan_contact_phone_required: Contact phone for the live Japan payment window is required.
settings_validation.japan_contact_opening_hours_required: Contact opening hours for the live Japan payment window are required.
settings_validation.replace_sample_value: Replace the sample Japan merchant display information with your real contract information in live mode.

payment_error.title: Payment Error
payment_error.message: An error occurred while processing the payment.

admin.test_mode_order_notice: This order was processed in test mode. Real card authorization/withdrawal notifications may occur, but KG Inicis test transactions may be automatically cancelled daily between 23:00 and 23:50. DO NOT ship this order.
admin.test_mode_settings_warning_title: Warning: KG Inicis payments are currently set to test mode.
admin.test_mode_settings_warning_body: Test payments do not create real payments. If the shop is live, switch this plugin to live payment mode before operating.
admin.order_verify_description: Query real-time payment status from KG Inicis servers.
admin.order_verify_error: An error occurred while querying payment status.
admin.cbt_reconciliation_description: Shows local processing failures after CBT approval and automatic refund results.
admin.cbt_reconciliation_manual_hint: Automatic refund failed. Retry the refund for the TID below, or cancel it manually in the KG Inicis JP merchant console if needed.
admin.cbt_reconciliation_refunded_hint: A local processing failure was detected after CBT approval, and the payment was automatically refunded.
admin.cbt_reconciliation_retry_error: CBT refund retry failed. Please try again later or cancel it manually in the KG Inicis merchant console.
admin.cbt_cvs_ops_description: Review Japan convenience store deposit notification (NOTI) history, pending deposit status, and test deposit handling.
admin.cbt_cvs_history_empty: No deposit notifications have been received yet.
admin.cbt_cvs_recheck_success: CBT convenience store status was rechecked.
admin.cbt_cvs_simulate_success: CBT convenience store paid simulation was processed.
admin.cbt_cvs_expire_success: The CBT convenience store order was marked as deposit expired.
admin.cash_receipt_description: Issue a cash receipt via KG Inicis INIAPI.
admin.escrow_delivery_description: Register delivery information for KG Inicis escrow payment.
admin.escrow_deny_confirm_description: Seller confirmation for buyer's purchase denial.

settings.title: KG Inicis Settings
settings.description: Manage KG Inicis payment plugin settings.
settings.test_mode_hint: Real card authorization/withdrawal notifications may still occur in test mode; test transactions may be automatically cancelled daily between 23:00 and 23:50.
settings.live_mode_warning_body: Real payments will occur. Verify that your live MID and keys are configured correctly.
settings.section_live_keys_hint: All live keys below can be found in your KG Inicis merchant console → Shop Info → Contract Info → KEY Information. Keep them secret.
settings.live_mid_hint: Live MID issued by KG Inicis (enter without the SIR prefix)
settings.live_mid_example: e.g.: shoptest → full MID used will be SIRshoptest
settings.live_sign_key_hint: Used to generate the payment window signature (SignKey).
settings.live_iniapi_key_hint: Used to authenticate cancel / inquiry API calls.
settings.live_iniapi_iv_hint: Initialization vector for cancel / inquiry API encryption.
settings.live_mobile_hash_key_hint: Used to generate P_CHKFAKE on the mobile payment page.
settings.section_easy_pay_hint: Configure KG Inicis easy pay services.
settings.easy_pay_allow_with_other_pg_hint: When enabled, KG Inicis easy pay buttons are shown on checkout even when another PG is configured as the default provider.
settings.easy_pay_samsung_pay_hint: Enable only if Samsung Pay is contracted separately with KG Inicis. Enter your live KG Inicis merchant ID and web sign key before live payments.
settings.easy_pay_naverpay_hint: Enable only if Naver Pay is contracted separately with KG Inicis. Enter your live KG Inicis merchant ID and web sign key before live payments.
settings.easy_pay_lpay_hint: Enable KG Inicis L.pay. Enter your live KG Inicis merchant ID and web sign key before live payments.
settings.easy_pay_kakaopay_hint: Enable KG Inicis Kakao Pay. Enter your live KG Inicis merchant ID and web sign key before live payments.
settings.section_japan_hint: Settings for Japanese Yen (JPY) payments via KG Inicis CBT (Cross Border Trade).
settings.japan_enabled_hint: Requires a separate CBT MID for Japanese Yen (JPY) payments.
settings.japan_restrict_jpy_payment_methods_hint: When enabled, JPY orders can proceed through CBT only with credit card, PayPay, or Japan convenience store payment. When disabled, the selected payment method is not restricted.
settings.test_japan_cbt_key_hint: Test KEY used for CBT hash data generation.
settings.live_japan_mid_hint: Live MID issued by KG Inicis CBT service.
settings.live_japan_cbt_key_hint: Live KEY used for CBT hash data generation. Keep this key secret.
settings.jppg_merchant_info_hint: Merchant and contact information included in the KG Inicis CBT JPPG extraData payload. Replace sample values with your live Japan payment contract information before launch.
settings.cbt_helper_description: Instantly create a sample product priced in JPY (100 yen) for Japan Payment (CBT) verification. After creation, switch the site language to Japanese and select KG Inicis as the payment method to open the CBT payment window.
settings.cbt_helper_create_error: Failed to create the test product. Please try again later.
settings.cbt_connectivity_description: The KG Inicis DEVCBT host (devcbt.inicis.com) requires the public IP that sends the payment/authentication request to be whitelisted by KG Inicis in advance. If your server or proxy connects to DEVCBT, register the Egress IP or Server Address shown below. If the user's browser is redirected directly to the DEVCBT payment page during testing, also request registration for the user's public PC IP. For example, if the current tester PC public IP is 59.10.38.149 and the server/proxy IP is 183.109.71.154, send both IPs to KG Inicis for registration. The user's public PC IP can change by tester and location, so each tester should verify their own IP. (The production host cbt.inicis.com has no whitelist restriction and is excluded from this diagnostic.)
settings.cbt_connectivity_check_error: Connectivity diagnostic failed. Please try again later.
settings.cbt_connectivity_hint_egress: The IP KG Inicis sees when the server reaches DEVCBT through a firewall, NAT, or proxy. Register this IP when testing through a proxy.
settings.cbt_connectivity_hint_whitelist: devcbt is only reachable after KG Inicis whitelists your IP. If the browser goes directly to DEVCBT during testing, the current user's public PC IP, such as 59.10.38.149, is also a registration target.
settings.cbt_callback_hint: The CBT returnUrl is where the browser returns after the external KG Inicis payment window. Verify that APP_URL is an HTTPS public domain and matches the callback URL host.
settings.section_escrow_hint: Escrow payment holds the buyer's payment until the product is received, then releases it to the seller.
settings.use_escrow_hint: When enabled, PC payments append useescrow to acceptmethod and mobile payments append useescrow=Y to P_RESERVED.
settings.redirect_success_url_hint: Supports relative paths or full URLs. {orderId} will be replaced with the actual order number.
settings.redirect_fail_url_hint: Supports relative paths or full URLs. Error details are appended as query parameters.
settings.vbank_notify_hint: Register this URL as the PC virtual account deposit notification URL in the KG Inicis merchant admin.
